content.answer:
Hi Ian, Dhika and Jianghong

Here refer the pre-reading deck for tomorrw THCB monthly meeting update.

Seek for your inputs.

Thx

Yu Cheng

Slide 22 - 25: Not clear the overall TH FBS (local + CB + SCS) 2025 plan
and strategy. How this is cascaded to CB (CNCB MP, KRCB MP and CNCB
Choice)? What are the warehouse capacity and rate card associated with this
plan?

Can we have a full picture of this?

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 12

   - What is this tax loss about?
- What is this rate reduction on SPX about?

Slide 14

   - How does the ABS right now compare with TH Local SCS ABS?

USD 2.95
   feels too low for TH market?

Slide 15

   - Similar comment to PH meeting, what is TB WA ABS in TH?

Think we need
   to push Lovito ABS to at least ~USD 8-10?

Slide 19

   - How is the new seller acquisition coming along?

Slide 22

   - Can look at ATP % as well for TH LFF?

I think it was one of the
   highest for all markets
   - How is the ATP for SCS and Lovito as well?

Slide 23

   - Is this for THWH or NNWH?

Not quite sure what this is about

Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com> 于2025年2月26日周三 13:37写道：

Hi Teams,

Here refer to the meeting minutes and next steps for last week's THCB
monthly meeting.
Sorry for a bit delay on this summary due to several further alignment with
CN LFF side till this week.
No. Topic Action Items PIC ETA
1 THCB SBS ADO Target Setting Discussion Overall:
TH side wants to push more on TH local SBS ADO with 70K~100K ADO by Dec
2025 which will be highly appreciated.
CN side proposed a version with TH local SBS ADO increased from 18.9K into
33.9K dec 2025 via several further initiatives support needed before the
THCB monthly meeting.

5 keys discussion alignment during the meeting:
--Handling Fee Decrease (Rate card): Remain no discount but go with
commission instead
--Commission: Remain commission gap 5% between 3PF and FBS
--Upgraded incentives: remain the same, but consolidate ref requests.
--Bulky inbound restriction: TH ok to go with bulky orders
--TISI: TH cross check with local CMI on the deep summary on TISI CB 3PF
sellers existing SKU

Next Step Actions:
CN LFF Team recalulation 2025 THCB SBS target and resources alignment with
TH side (ETA get back on Mar 14) CN LFF Team : Bufei/Derek
THCB Team: Winnie/Jack 14 Mar
2 CB SOB SHP/TTS Direction: Top CB sellers who lost over TTS, we want to
maintain SOB with compromising PC2 meanwhile THCB side will need to recheck
with local CMI on the top CB seller if it matches with the overall TH
Shopee seller focus pool.

Next Step Action:
To align with TH CMI on the top seller list if top CB seller is actually
matter to plat.
To align on the PC2 bottom line that platform can accept
To Increase mapping coverage and map top sellers with different incentives
of each program >> make sure they don’t get duplicated benefits eg SSP or
other programs.
Review on CNCB new proposal of counter TTS program seller pool
THCB Team: Tiffany 14 Mar
3 Regional SSP update Done and Dhika already approval email for execution
and budget request THCB Team: Tiffany Done



Yu C
